caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on the discussion of S.23, a bill aimed at increasing the minimum wage. The scene is set in a well-lit conference room with attendees dressed in business attire, indicating the seriousness of the proceedings. A woman with short gray hair, wearing glasses and a black blazer, is seated and appears to be attentively listening or participating in the discussion. In the background, other individuals can be seen, including one holding an orange tote bag with a cartoon character on it. The atmosphere suggests a structured and professional environment where important legislative matters are being addressed.
